prompt:
Editorial portrait photography arranged in a 2x2 grid layout featuring the same man with round tortoiseshell glasses, natural look, light beard, soft neutral background.
Top-left: front-facing portrait with direct eye contact, calm expression.
Top-right: extreme macro close-up of eye behind glasses, ultra-detailed iris and skin texture.
Bottom-left: slightly lower angle portrait, subtle expression, soft shadows.
Bottom-right: side profile portrait, natural pose, looking away.
Soft diffused natural lighting, warm neutral tones, shallow depth of field, ultra-realistic skin texture with visible pores and freckles, minimal retouching, 85mm lens, high-end editorial photography style, clean composition, 4K
